AntiPatterns: Khong query toan model khi chi can selection, active view, hoac category hep.
RecoveryHints: Giam scope query va max_results neu payload qua lon hoac noise.

AntiPatterns: Khong skip preview voi delete/destructive flow.
RecoveryHints: Neu context drift, refresh fingerprint roi preview lai truoc khi execute.

AntiPatterns: Khong dung screenshot schedule khi du lieu structured da du.
RecoveryHints: Thu giam MaxRows neu schedule qua lon.

AntiPatterns: Khong claim compliance vuot qua data da extract duoc.
RecoveryHints: Neu findings qua nhieu, thu thu hep sheet scope hoac ruleset.

AntiPatterns: Khong assume family doc anatomy day du neu family in-place hoac non-editable.
RecoveryHints: Neu family khong editable, fallback ve project-level family summary va nested usage review.

AntiPatterns: Khong inline image/base64 vao context v1 khi structured data da du cho QC.
RecoveryHints: Neu sheet qua nang, giam MaxViewports hoac tat IncludeScheduleData.

AntiPatterns: Khong nhay vao task.plan khi chua ro workflow/fix loop goal.
RecoveryHints: Neu task runtime bi block, doc task.get_run va task.get_residuals truoc khi resume.

AntiPatterns: Khong add parameter khi active doc khong phai family doc — phai switch lane B truoc.
Khong add parameter trung ten voi built-in hoac shared parameter da co.
Khong dung script.run_safe de add parameter khi family.add_parameter_safe du kha nang.
RecoveryHints: Kiem tra family.xray xem parameter da ton tai chua truoc khi goi lai.
Neu FamilyParameterExists, dung family.set_parameter_formula_safe de cap nhat formula thay vi add moi.

AntiPatterns: Khong set formula cho shared parameter (Revit khong cho phep).
Khong set formula circular reference (A = B, B = A).
TypicalChains: family.xray -> family.set_parameter_formula_safe (khi param da co, chi can set formula)
RecoveryHints: Neu formula invalid, kiem tra parameter type phai tuong thich (Length formula cho Length param).

AntiPatterns: Khong tao qua nhieu types (> 50) trong mot lan goi — dung batch mode.
Khong set value cho parameter chua ton tai — phai add parameter truoc.
TypicalChains: family.xray -> family.set_type_catalog_safe (khi param da co, chi can tao types)
RecoveryHints: Neu type name trung, Revit tu dong them suffix. Kiem tra family.xray sau khi execute.

AntiPatterns: Khong goi khi active doc khong phai family doc.
TypicalChains: family.list_geometry -> family.set_subcategory_safe (assign subcategory cho existing form)
RecoveryHints: Neu return empty, family doc chua co geometry — bat dau voi family.create_extrusion_safe.

AntiPatterns: Khong tao extrusion khi chua co reference plane phu hop — dung family.add_reference_plane_safe truoc.
Khong tao void extrusion khi chua co solid host.
Khong dung family.create_extrusion_safe cho geometry phuc tap (lofted, adaptive) — dung script.run_safe.
RecoveryHints: Neu profile invalid (self-intersecting), giam so vertices hoac simplify profile.
Neu sketch plane khong ton tai, dung family.add_reference_plane_safe tao truoc.

AntiPatterns: Khong dung sweep khi extrusion don gian du (box, cylinder) — extrusion nhe hon.
Khong tao sweep voi path tu giao (self-intersecting).
RecoveryHints: Neu path khong hop le, kiem tra path points phai co >= 2 diem va khong trung nhau.

AntiPatterns: Khong dung blend khi top va bottom profile giong nhau — dung extrusion thay.
Top va bottom profile phai cung so loop count.
RecoveryHints: Neu Revit bao loi 'cannot create blend', kiem tra 2 profiles co cung so edges.

AntiPatterns: Khong dung revolution cho geometry khong co truc quay ro rang.
Profile khong duoc cat qua axis (phai nam 1 phia cua axis).
RecoveryHints: Neu profile vuot qua axis, thu flip axis direction hoac di chuyen profile.

AntiPatterns: Khong tao qua nhieu ref planes khong can thiet — chi tao cho constraint geometry.
Khong dung khi ref plane da ton tai voi name tuong tu.
RecoveryHints: Neu name trung, Revit tu append suffix. Kiem tra family.xray de verify.

AntiPatterns: Khong gan subcategory cho element khong phai geometry form (ref planes, connectors).
Khong tao subcategory ten trung voi built-in subcategory.
RecoveryHints: Neu subcategory khong ton tai, tool se tu tao. Kiem tra family.xray de verify.

AntiPatterns: Khong load nested family tu path khong nam trong library roots da allowlist.
Khong overwrite existing nested family khi khong biet version hien tai — check family.xray truoc.
RecoveryHints: Neu file path invalid, kiem tra family.list_library_roots de lay allowed paths.

AntiPatterns: Khong save ngay sau khi tao family rong — phai co it nhat 1 geometry form hoac parameter.
Khong save khi con pending issues tu family.xray.
RecoveryHints: Neu save that bai, kiem tra file lock hoac read-only attribute.

AntiPatterns: Khong chay script truoc khi xem catalog — luon goi script.list truoc.
RecoveryHints: Neu catalog rong, kiem tra ScriptCatalogPath trong settings.

AntiPatterns: Khong skip validate truoc khi run — luon validate de phat hien blocked APIs.
Khong validate script inline ma khong co trong catalog.
RecoveryHints: Neu DangerousApis detected, sua script hoac dung bridge tool thay the.

AntiPatterns: Khong chay inline script cho task da co bridge tool tuong ung (family.add_parameter_safe, family.create_extrusion_safe, etc.).
Khong skip script.validate truoc khi run.
Khong chay script mutation khi co bridge tool lam duoc viec tuong tu — uu tien bridge tool vi co dry-run/approval.
Khong dung cho task don gian: add parameter, create box, set formula — bridge tools an toan hon.
RecoveryHints: Neu script timeout, kiem tra ScriptMaxTimeoutMs setting va optimize script.
Neu script loi, xem script.get_run de lay error details.

AntiPatterns: Khong goi khi chua co run_id tu script.run_safe.
RecoveryHints: Neu run not found, kiem tra run_id co dung format.

AntiPatterns: Khong compose khi chi co 1 script — dung script.run_safe.
Khong mix bridge tools va scripts trong compose — compose chi cho scripts.
Khong dung compose khi tung script co the chay doc lap — dung pipeline thay.
RecoveryHints: Neu atomicTransaction va 1 step fail, toan bo se rollback. Xem script.get_run de biet step nao fail.
